name: Juvenile Justice Intake
description: Juvenile justice intake for juvenile probation officers, court intake workers, and diversion program staff conducting an initial assessment of a youth referred to the juvenile justice system. Evaluates the referral, developmental factors, family and school context, diversion eligibility, detention necessity, and service needs to produce a juvenile intake profile with disposition recommendations and risk flags.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
